notes: Band-1 single-subagent dispatch. Brief originally assumed services/auth-svc/ existed on main; it doesn't (the auth-svc scaffolding is on wip/auth-svc-session-manager). Orchestrator sent a steering message redirecting to a 5-file greenfield scaffold; subagent completed cleanly. AC5 (docker build) was verified by symmetry (Dockerfile is byte-identical to hello-world's); Docker daemon not running on this machine so the subagent couldn't execute the build directly. The cycle's PUT step ran cleanly using the python-based pattern from merge_pr31_cycle.sh; the jq-bug fix from the previous turn carried forward without issue. The cycle's drift check was a false positive due to a string-vs-bool comparison; the live rule is correct and the script has been patched for future cycles. PR #33 is merged into main as 69d2525.
